name: claude-crew
description: A technology-agnostic AI engineering crew: 15 expert subagents (architect, frontend, backend, DBA, designer, QA, DevOps, copywriter, SEO/AEO, security, data compliance, a Mermaid architecture-mapper, and reviewers) plus an orchestrating workflow (/work), an on-demand architecture map (/diagram → docs/ARCHITECTURE.md), an optional Notion kanban ticket layer (/board, /feature, /bug, /spike, /epic), git/worktree/commit protocol, and quality gates.
